subject: Parent-Teacher Conference Week — Sign up now
snippet: Parent-Teacher conferences are scheduled for August 4-8. Please sign up for your time slot.
bodyText: Dear Parents, Parent-Teacher conferences are scheduled for the week of August 4-8, 2026. Please sign up for your preferred time slot using the link below. Slots are 15 minutes each. Available times are 3:00 PM - 7:00 PM Monday through Thursday and 1:00 PM - 5:00 PM on Friday. Sign up at: https://signup.example.com/ptconference2026

extractedEvent.title: Parent-Teacher Conference Week
extractedEvent.description: Sign up for 15-minute slot at signup.example.com

subject: Back-to-School Night — August 5 at 6:00 PM
snippet: Join us for Back-to-School Night on August 5 at 6:00 PM to meet the teachers.
bodyText: Dear Families, You are invited to Back-to-School Night on Wednesday, August 5, 2026 at 6:00 PM in the school gymnasium. You will have the opportunity to meet your child's teacher, learn about curriculum expectations, and tour the classroom. Light refreshments will be served. We look forward to seeing you!

extractedEvent.title: Back-to-School Night
extractedEvent.description: Meet teacher, curriculum overview, classroom tour

subject: Your conference slot confirmed — August 6 at 4:15 PM
snippet: Your parent-teacher conference with Mrs. Thompson is confirmed for August 6 at 4:15 PM.
bodyText: Dear Parent/Guardian, I'm looking forward to our conference on Thursday, August 6, 2026 at 4:15 PM in Room 12. We will discuss your child's academic progress, social development, and goals for the coming school year. The meeting will be approximately 15 minutes. Please don't hesitate to email me with any questions beforehand.

subject: PTA Meeting — August 7 at 7:00 PM
snippet: Monthly PTA meeting on August 7 at 7:00 PM. School year planning on the agenda.
bodyText: Dear PTA Members, Our monthly PTA meeting will be held on Friday, August 7, 2026 at 7:00 PM in the school library. This month's agenda includes: school year planning, fundraiser discussion, and volunteer sign-ups for Back-to-School events. Light snacks will be provided. We hope to see you there!

extractedEvent.title: PTA monthly meeting
extractedEvent.description: School year planning, fundraiser, volunteer sign-ups

subject: School supply list for 2026-2027 school year
snippet: Please review and purchase the attached school supply list before the first day.
bodyText: Dear Parents, Please find attached the school supply list for the 2026-2027 school year. The first day of school is August 17, 2026. Supplies should be purchased and brought by orientation day, August 14, 2026. If you need assistance with supplies, please contact the main office. We look forward to a great school year!

extractedEvent.title: School orientation day
extractedEvent.description: Bring school supplies, first day Aug 17
